description: A Flutter application source file defining the main app widget and home page, which displays a loading message indicating that the app is being generated.

classes.name: MyApp
classes.description: The root widget of the Flutter application setting up the MaterialApp with theme and home page.

classes.name: MyHomePage
classes.description: A stateful widget representing the main page, displaying a loading message.

classes.name: _MyHomePageState
classes.description: State class for MyHomePage, builds the UI with AppBar and loading indicators.

methods.name: main
methods.description: Entry point of the Flutter application that runs the MyApp widget.

methods.name: build
methods.description: Method to create the widget tree for MyApp and _MyHomePageState.
